name: radial-chart
description: Concentric ring chart: multiple rings with partial fill (0–100% per ring), blue gradient, center hole, optional center text

data.name: data
data.description: One item per concentric ring. value = fill percentage (0–100). Example: [{ value: 90 }, { value: 80 }, { value: 50 }]

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels.

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels.

innerRadius.name: innerRadius
innerRadius.description: Inner radius of the chart (center hole). Example: '20%'

backgroundColor.name: backgroundColor
backgroundColor.description: Color for the unfilled portion of each ring.

showLabel.name: showLabel
showLabel.description: Whether to show segment labels on the rings.

startAngle.name: startAngle
startAngle.description: Start angle of the fill in degrees. 0 = right, 90 = top.

clockwise.name: clockwise
clockwise.description: Direction of the fill and animation: true = clockwise, false = counter-clockwise (anti-clockwise).

ringGap.name: ringGap
ringGap.description: Gap between concentric rings (e.g. '4%' or number).

centerText.name: centerText
centerText.description: Optional center text (e.g. main value or title).

centerSubtext.name: centerSubtext
centerSubtext.description: Optional center subtext below center text (e.g. label or unit).

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance.

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart segments. Overrides theme colors.
